libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Set native test runtime system properties for the generated tests: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer on 127.0.0.1 for WebClient coverage; no external service or Docker container is needed.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The unsafe-access properties are driven by the Netty 4.2.x dependency and Java 25 native-image behavior; local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative.
Avoid optional OAuth2-specific WebClient scenarios unless an additional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 test dependency is intentionally added.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 is usable with its normal transitive dependencies and localhost Vert.x servers, but its Vert.x 5.0.1 stack resolves Netty 4.2.2.Final, so Java 25 native-image runtime tests likely need the same Netty unsafe-access system properties already used for 5.0.0.
